shorts.title: Scranton residents mark Earth Day with hands-on effort
shorts.title_distilled: Scranton residents mark Earth Day with hands-on effort.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Lackawanna County is marking Earth Day with hands-on efforts across Scranton. On Wednesday, the county hosted an information fair inside the government center, while volunteers cleaned up around the courthouse, picking up trash and cigarette butts. The county says it's all about raising awareness and encouraging small actions that make [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Lackawanna County is marking Earth Day with hands-on efforts across Scranton. shorts.title: Scranton council puts pause on kratom ban
shorts.title_distilled: Scranton council puts pause on kratom ban.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — There is no kratom ban in Scranton, at least not yet. The city council voted unanimously on Tuesday to put the proposed ordinance on hold. Kratom is an herbal supplement you can buy at gas stations and smoke shops. It's unregulated in Pennsylvania, and the US Food and Drug Administration [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — There is no kratom ban in Scranton, at least not yet. The city council voted unanimously on Tuesday to put the proposed ordinance on hold. Kratom is an herbal supplement you can buy at gas stations and smoke shops. It's unregulated in Pennsylvania, and the US Food and Drug Administration [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — There is no kratom ban in Scranton, at least not yet.
